titleStmt.title: SII 31.167: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 167. (A.R. No. B 344 of 1938.) MĀDĀLA, SATTENAPALLE TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On pillar lying in the Sagarēśvara śvāmi temple.
It is dated in Śaka 1077, expressed in Chronagram: Muni-śaila-kh-ēndu. Solar eclipse (month not mentioned) corresponding to 1155 A.D.

It records the gift of 55 sheep (goṟiyalu) on the day of Solar eclipse for maintaining the perpetual lamp in the temple of Sakalēśvara at Māvuṁdala, by Javāḍa Nāmana belonging to Yājñavalka and Kāśyaka gōtra for the merit of himself. The gift is entrusted to Bhamanabōya, son of Yimdula Mānebōya.
In the Sanskrit portion. Nāma is described as great grandson of Karna of Velanāṇti Gonka family.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmāna bhūdavani dēvakulāpataṁsaḥ
puṁsavaraḥ parahita caraṇaḥ prabhāvā
nnāmnasamastabudha bāṁddhava ka¨rnnanāmā
dhanādha Itisadguṇa bhūramātyaḥ
tasyātmajāta ssujanatilakaḥ kāṁtivāṁkōmṛ
gāṁkōgoṁkaḥ śrīmānpatihitaratā komma
mā tasyabhā¨ryyātābhyaṁ jātassakalavinu
taśśīla vīlābhirāmō nāmastōmaṁ jagati vi
duṣāṁ va¨rddhayanva¨rddhataḥ śrīḥ śākābdhēmuni
śailakhēṁdu gaṇitē sū¨ryyōparāgē dinē
gōtravāridhi
prādāddīpaṁ makhaṇḍamāyuga śataṁmāvuṁdalu
khēpurau rājadrāja kalā¨rdharāya kāḷīśvarā
yādarāt . svasti sakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1077 nēṁṭṭī sū
¨ryyagrahaṇanimityamuna nājñavalyūkula tilakuṁḍu
nukāśyapagōtruṁḍununaina javāḍa nāmana tanakudha¨rmma
mugā māvuṁdala śrī sakalēśvara mahādēvaraku Akhaṁḍa va
tti dīpaṁbunaku niccinagoṟiyalu 55 vīniṁjēkoni
yiṁdulamīdi bōyinikoḍkubramana bōyuṁḍu dana
putrānu pavitrika mācaṁdrā¨rkamu nityamāneṁḍu
neyi yī dīpaṁbunakuṁ bōyaṁgala vāḍu .
Digital edition of SII 31.167 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
